subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! My heart hath melted from separation and estrangement from Thee, and my limbs tremble in my remoteness from the precincts of Thy nearness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی قد ذاب قلبی من هجرک و فراقک و ارتجفت مفاصلی فی بعدی عن ساحه قربک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
